titleStmt.title: SII 34.37: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 37. Tiruppanandāḷ, Kumbakonam Taluk, Thanjavur District. On the north wall of the first prākāra of the Arjunajaṭēśvara temple.

summary.p: Pāṇḍya, Jaṭāvarman Sundarapāṇḍya I, . . ., Kanya, sudi. 8, Sunday, Utarāshāḍha. = A.D. 1251-70.

Built in at the end. Gift of land for offerings and repair works (kuṟaivaṟuppu) on festival days in the temple of Tiruttāṭakēśvaram-uḍaiya-nāyaṉār at Tiruppanandāḷ by the sabhā of the village. The living quarters of tachchan, ambaṭṭaṉ and Veḷḷāḷaṉ are mentioned separately while describing the boundaries of the gift land.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrīḥ cimaṟkittikku mEl kOṟcaṭapaṉmar tirupuvaṉa cakkaravattikaḷ śrī perumāḷ cuntarapā vatu kanni nāyaṟṟu pūrvvapakṣattu A[ ṣṭamiyum] nāyaṟṟuk kiḻamaiyum peṟṟa Uttirāṭattu nāḷ vaṭakarai virutarāca payaṅkara vaḷanāṭṭu maṇṇi nāṭṭu brahmadeśam tiruppaṉantāḷ Uṭaiyār tiruttāṭakīśvaramuṭaiya nāyaṉār kOyil Āticaṇḍeśvara tEvakaṉmikaḷukku tiruppaṉantāḷ sabhaiyārOm Iṉṉāyanār Eḻuntaruḷum tirunāṭkaḷil nācciya
Eṅkaḷ kuṟaivaṟuppukku Amutupaṭi cāttuppaṭi tiruviḷakkeṇṇai śrīpātam tāṅkum Āḷukku koṟṟum Uṭpaṭa tukku nāṅkaḷ tirunāmattukkāṇiyāka viṭṭa Ivvūril Iruṉūṟṟu patiṉaṟuvvatikku mēṟku Irācātarācavāykkālukku vaṭakku Eṅkaḷutāṉa Uṉṉappuṟam ṛṣabhapōkameṉṟu pēr kūvappaṭṭa vilai nilattukkum kollaikkum kīḻpāṟkellai Iṉṉāyanār tirunāmattukkāṇik kollaikku mēṟkum teṉpāṟkellai Irācātarāca vāykkalukku vaṭakkum mēṟpāṟkel
ṟ kellaiyum peruvaḻikku teṟku Āka Iṉṉāṉkellaikku Uṭpaṭṭa vilainilam kollaiyum mikitikkuṟai U kuḻi Aṟunūṟum Ivatikku mēṟku Ivāykkālukku teṟku Ūṟkuḷattukku vaṭakaraippaṭṭapaṭṭaippāḻnilattukku kīḻpāṟkellai taccaṉ Ampaṭṭaṉ Uḷḷiṭṭa natattukku teṉpāṟkellai Ūṟkuḷattukku nīrpāykiṟa vāykkālukku mēṟkum vaṭakaraiyāy veḷḷāḷaṉ ṉatattukku pōkiṟavaḻikku vaṭakkum mēlpāṟkellai tiruvītikku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai paṇimakkaḷ ca
vaḻikku teṟkum Āka Iṉṉāṉkellaikku Uṭpaṭṭa mikitikkuṟai Uṭpaṭṭa paṭṭapāḻ kuḻi 100 Ikkuḻiṉūṟum Āka ṉācciyār tirunāḷkaḷukku vēṇṭum kuṟaivaṟuppukkaḷukku Uṭalāka kuṭuttōm Iṉṉilaṅkaḷ kārum maṟuvum tiruttōpput tirunantavaṉam Uḷḷiṭṭavai payiṟ ceytukkoḷḷavum Iṉṉilaṅkaḷ Iṉṉācciyār tirunāḷaikku Iṟaiyiliyāka kaḻittut tarak kaṭavōmmākavum Iṉṉāyanār kōyilil tirukkaṭṭaḷaiyilē kallum veṭṭikkoḷḷak kaṭavārkaḷākavum Ippaṭi cammatit
ṇikkuṭuttōm Uṭaiyār tiruttāṭakaiśvaramuṭaiya nāyaṉār kōyilil Āticaṇḍeśvara tēvaṟku tirupaṉantāḷ sabhaiyārōm Ippaṭikku Ivai maturāntakaṉ śrīmātavapaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟivēṉ vaṟsan nārāyaṇa śrīmātavapaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai tirumiḻalaiyā śvarapaṭṭaratirātrayājiyēṉ Ippaṭikku Ivai vaṟcan sarvēśvaranāraṇa paṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu śrīrāmapaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttuḥ—
Digital edition of SII 34.37 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
